creator: Connie Loizos
title: (No AI) Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.
contentSnippet: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.

creator: Tim Fernholz
title: (No AI) Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
dc:creator: Tim Fernholz
content: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."
contentSnippet: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

title: (No AI) Sam Altman was winning on the stand, but it might not be enough
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![A blurry shot of Sam Altman, double-exposed in red and cyan.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Vrg_illo_Sam_Altman_stock_trial.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Who, me? | Image: The Verge; Getty Images

After two weeks of hearing from assorted witnesses that he was a lying snake, the jury finally heard from the lying snake himself: Sam Altman. At the end of the testimony, his lawyer William Savitt asked him how it felt to be accused of stealing a charity.

"We created, through a ton of hard work, this extremely large charity, and I agree you can't steal it," Altman said. "Mr. Musk did try to kill it, I guess. Twice."

Altman was fully in "nice kid from St. Louis" mode, and did a passable impression of a man who was bewildered at what was happening to him. When he stepped down from the stand holding a stack of evidence binders, he even look …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/929129/sam-altman-testimony-elon-musk-openai-trial)

title: (No AI) Meta won’t let you block its AI account on Threads
author: Jay Peters
content:
![An image showing the Threads logo](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/24774110/STK156_Instagram_threads_1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Meta announced on Tuesday that it's testing a Threads feature that lets users tag a Meta AI account to get answers to questions or context about a conversation on the platform. If you've spent any time looking at replies on X as of late, this new feature sounds a lot like Meta's take on people tagging xAI's Grok. But, [as reported by _Engadget_](https://www.engadget.com/2171113/threads-users-are-pissed-they-cant-block-metas-new-ai-chatbot/), Threads users quickly discovered that you can't block the new Meta AI account, and they aren't happy about it.

Meta has invested heavily in AI as it works to catch up to rivals like OpenAI and Google, [spending billions to hire AI talent](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/703929/meta-openai-anthropic-superintelligence-lab-ai-poaching-money). It launched a new AI model called [Muse Spark in April](https://www.theverge.com/tech/908769/meta-muse-spark-ai-model-launch-rollout), which it s …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/929091/meta-ai-threads-account-block)

creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
title: (No AI) Elon Musk Had ‘Hair-Raising’ Idea of Passing OpenAI On to His Kids, Sam Altman Says
dc:creator: Maxwell Zeff, Paresh Dave
content: Musk’s lawyers questioned Altman over allegations of deception and his network of financial investments, but the OpenAI CEO painted a picture of Musk as obsessed with controlling the company.

creator: Molly Taft
title: (No AI) xAI Adds 19 New Gas Turbines Despite Ongoing Lawsuit
dc:creator: Molly Taft
content: Emails show that Elon Musk’s company is expanding its use of portable gas-fired power at its Colossus 2 site as a fight over air quality continues.
